column13: KWB medical person, not able to pick up.
Charged $50 membership fee, so $50 deducted from 1st full week trial.

Hello,

I spoke with Sara Hale via email. She recommended doing:

hares.org> wrote:
Hi Mary, I would recommend you try a half and a mini for your trial—the first week would be the half share, which is actually the full size, but it’s an every other week. rather than weekly pickup. We would have you come back for the mini share in two weeks, so you could see how you get through the full share in two weeks. 

Also she said I could pick up from the Kirkwood site. 

We can send the trial to Kirkwood—we usually like to do it at the main site so we can answer questions and be able to make adjustments if needed, but with everything being pre-packed anyway, we can take care of all your questions by email.

Would this be possible for the trial?

Thanks,
Mary
Former member ... just moving back from Dallas. Never found anything like you all there. So excited!,
Margaret KosciolekCSA week $10.00 if she joins.,
